title: SYRINGE EXCHANGE - 211info
text: JACKSON COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH SYRINGE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe disposal of used syringes, access to sterile syringes, and new safer injection supplies and sharps containers. Naloxone and other overdose rescue kits are available. Services are availabe on-site and also at various pop-up clinics. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: On-site: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 2pm-4pm Pop-up clinics: Varies Email (541) 774-3333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-3333 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Between Holly and Ivy Streets off W 8th Avenue Services: Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - JACKSON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JACKSON COUNTY MENTAL HEALTH
